skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem:
y=-2x+7

One of the equations in a system of two linear equations is given. The system has no solution. Which equation could be the second equation in the system?
rationale: Choice A is correct. For no solution, the second equation must have the same slope as the given line (-2) but a different y-intercept. Choice A simplifies to y = -2x + 8, parallel and distinct. Choice B has slope 2. Choice C is the same line. Choice D simplifies to y = 2x + 7 (slope 2).
